capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an application development management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an application development management service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise application development management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the application development management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular application development management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for application development?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application development KPIs and KRIs are documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for application development

questions.prompt: Are application development KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track defect escape rate, CI/CD security gate pass rate, or mean time to remediate vulnerabilities found in development?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether modern SDLC security and quality metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Defect escape and security gate metrics

questions.prompt: How does the organization measure vulnerability remediation velocity for findings discovered during development and testing?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether vulnerability remediation velocity in SDLC is measured
questions.evaluation_focus: Vulnerability remediation velocity in SDLC

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a documented application development strategy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an application development strategy exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Application development strategy exists

questions.prompt: Does the development strategy incorporate security at early stages (design, requirements, and architecture)?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether security is incorporated at early development stages
questions.evaluation_focus: Security incorporated at early development stages

questions.prompt: Does the strategy include automation of code delivery and secure environment provisioning?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the strategy covers automation and secure provisioning
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation of code and secure provisioning

questions.prompt: Does the application development strategy account for AI-accelerated attack and defense trends, including faster vulnerability discovery and pre-release verification requirements?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the strategy reflects an AI-era threat model
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-era threat model reflected in development strategy

questions.prompt: Are application development policies and strategies reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether policies and strategies are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular review of application development policies and strategies

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have clear business owners for applications and documented separation of duties between owners and developers?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether business owners and separation of duties policies exist
questions.evaluation_focus: Clear business owners and separation of duties policies

questions.prompt: Do application developers and testers have access only to staging or development environments—not production?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether developers and testers are limited to non-production environments
questions.evaluation_focus: Developers and testers limited to staging environments

questions.prompt: Are formal business analysts engaged to review and translate application requirements accurately before development?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether formal business analysts support requirements governance
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal business analysts for requirements review and translation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise adopt DevSecOps software to manage application delivery pipelines?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether DevSecOps software is adopted
questions.evaluation_focus: DevSecOps software adoption

questions.prompt: Does DevSecOps software automate support for key application development milestones (build, test, deploy)?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether DevSecOps software automates development milestones
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation support for application development milestones

questions.prompt: Is the CI/CD pipeline utilized for all applications (or all in-scope critical applications)?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether CI/CD is utilized broadly across applications
questions.evaluation_focus: CI/CD pipeline utilized for all applications

questions.prompt: Is DevSecOps software configuration reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether DevSecOps configuration is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular DevSecOps software configuration review

questions.prompt: Is DevSecOps software integrated with workload management, application health monitoring, compliance management, and vulnerability management systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether DevSecOps integrates with adjacent security and operations platforms
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with workload management, monitoring, compliance, and vulnerability systems

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use application security testing tools that support static (SAST) and dynamic (DAST) analysis in CI/CD for all new applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SAST and DAST run in CI/CD for new applications
questions.evaluation_focus: Static and dynamic testing in CI/CD for all applications

questions.prompt: Are static and dynamic security tests automated as part of the CI/CD pipeline with defined pass/fail gates?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether static and dynamic testing is automated with security gates
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated static and dynamic testing

questions.prompt: Can application testing tools proactively identify issues in builds based on security playbooks or threat models?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether proactive issue identification uses playbooks or threat models
questions.evaluation_focus: Proactive issue identification based on playbooks

questions.prompt: Are testing tools integrated with other platforms (for example vulnerability management or code repositories) to provide contextual analysis of findings?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing tools integrate for contextual analysis
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with other platforms for contextual analysis

questions.prompt: Does the organization use AI-assisted pre-release security analysis (for example augmented SAST triage, fuzzing guidance, or exploit-path prediction) before production deployment?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI-assisted pre-release security analysis is used
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-assisted pre-release security analysis

questions.prompt: Do CI/CD pipelines manage user access to developer and production environments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether CI/CD pipelines govern environment access
questions.evaluation_focus: CI/CD pipelines manage user access to developer and production environments

questions.prompt: Are developer accounts removed from all applications automatically once deployment to production is complete?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether developer account removal after production deployment is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated developer account removal

questions.prompt: Does code scanning detect developer account anomalies or credentials embedded in production code and route findings to vulnerability management for remediation?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code scanning detects dev account anomalies in production code
questions.evaluation_focus: Code scanning detects dev account anomalies in production code

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal DevSecOps architect responsible for secure design standards across enterprise-wide applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal DevSecOps architect supports enterprise applications
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal DevSecOps architect for enterprise-wide applications

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise engage external experts to formally review code for all applications or critical applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether external expert code review is performed for in-scope applications
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal external expert code review

questions.prompt: Does external or peer code review explicitly cover AI-generated or AI-assisted code paths and high-risk changes before release?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether review covers AI-generated or AI-assisted code
questions.evaluation_focus: Review coverage for AI-generated or AI-assisted code

questions.prompt: Does the CI/CD pipeline generate a software bill of materials (SBOM) for application builds before release?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SBOMs are generated in CI/CD
questions.evaluation_focus: Software bill of materials (SBOM) generation in CI/CD

questions.prompt: Are open-source and third-party dependencies scanned for known vulnerabilities as part of the CI/CD pipeline?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether dependency vulnerability scanning runs in CI/CD
questions.evaluation_focus: Dependency and open-source vulnerability scanning in pipeline

questions.prompt: Are policies enforced to block or remediate releases that include prohibited, outdated, or unapproved third-party components?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether third-party component policies are enforced before release
questions.evaluation_focus: Third-party component policy enforcement before release

questions.prompt: Does the organization maintain a policy distinguishing approved AI coding tools from shadow or unapproved tools used in development?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether approved versus shadow AI coding tools are governed
questions.evaluation_focus: Approved versus shadow AI coding tool policy

questions.prompt: Are AI-generated or AI-assisted code changes subject to the same review, testing, and security gate requirements as human-written code?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI-generated code meets review and testing requirements
questions.evaluation_focus: Review and testing requirements for AI-generated code

questions.prompt: Are guardrails in place for AI use in development and testing workflows (for example prohibiting secrets in prompts, restricting training data exposure, or limiting autonomous deployment)?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether guardrails govern AI use in development workflows
questions.evaluation_focus: Guardrails for AI use in development and testing workflows
